gist.headline: Anyproject joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! Anyproject (beta) lets you play and share AI-generated sites, powered by our text generation API.
gist.summary: Added Anyproject (beta) to the community apps showcase, a platform for generating and sharing AI-created websites.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and explore Anyproject directly from the apps greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a community app for generating and sharing websites. Visuals should include a greenhouse setting (referencing GREENHOUSE.md), blueprints or miniature web pages, and Polly the bee collaborating with the Monitor Robot to build a tiny site.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot looking at a glowing miniature website floating above a lime green (#ecf874) drafting table inside a lush greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
